headline: The government wants its websites to be as shiny as Silicon Valley's. An Airbnb founder is helping.
summary: Joe Gebbia is one of the co-founders of Airbnb, but he's also the first-ever chief design officer of the US. He's responsible for redesigning the government's clunky websites and turning them into glossy copies of high-end corporate websites that are easy to use.

raw.headline: The government wants its websites to be as shiny as Silicon Valley's. An Airbnb founder is helping.
raw.summary: Joe Gebbia is one of the co-founders of Airbnb, but he's also the first-ever chief design officer of the US. He's responsible for redesigning the government's clunky websites and turning them into glossy copies of high-end corporate websites that are easy to use.

headline: US Chief Design Officer Joe Gebbia breaks down the website creation for Trump Accounts
summary: Yahoo Finance's Jennifer Schonberger spoke with the first-ever Chief Design Officer of the United States, Joe Gebbia, highlighting the rollout, engineering process, and early funding milestones of the new "Trump Accounts" savings and trading platform for children. Gebbia is also an Airbnb co-founder.
